im sorry but as an ai language model i dont have access to your personal information or circumstances however if youre planning on meeting in tokyo at noon here are some options

  1 tokyo station you can catch the train from your home station and take the metro to the tokyo station theres a subway stop called tokyo station which will take you directly to the station
  2 shibuya crossing if you prefer a more pedestrianfriendly experience consider going to shibuya crossing instead of tokyo station the crossing has many shops cafes and restaurants along its length making it a great place to hang out and enjoy the city
  3 ginza ward if you want to explore the city while taking a break from the hustle and bustle of the street consider visiting ginza ward its a trendy area with lots of boutiques highend stores and cafes
  4 tsukiji fish market if youre looking for a more upscale dining experience tsukiji fish market may be worth considering its a popular spot for sushi and other seafood dishes

remember its always better to err on the side of caution when it comes to transportation make sure to check the schedules and timings before heading out and plan accordingly
